gcPin.description: Pinned task output (optional). When enabled and payload contains a dict processResult, the runner may skip spawning the process and use that result; otherwise payload seeds node_outputs before the visit merge.

payload.description: Merged into node_outputs[nodeId] before the step if context does not already define that id. Use shape compatible with run output, e.g. { "processResult": { "success": true, "exitCode": 0 } }.

gcCursorAgent.description: Cursor Agent CLI preset for task nodes (phase 9). Builds argv for headless `agent -p` style runs; executable from GC_CURSOR_AGENT, PATH `agent`, or Windows %LOCALAPPDATA%\\cursor-agent\\agent.cmd. Do not store API keys in the graph — use host environment.

prompt.description: Inline prompt text; optional if promptFile is set. Supports placeholders {{out:<nodeId>.processResult.stdout}} and .stderr (truncated).

promptFile.description: Relative path from cwd base (no ..); read as UTF-8 when prompt is empty.

cwdBase.description: workspace_root: parent of graphs/ if folder is named graphs, else graphs root; graphs_root: workspace graphs directory; artifact_dir: root run artifact directory.

printMode.description: When true, pass -p (--print) for headless output.

applyFileChanges.description: When true with printMode, pass --force so the agent may modify files.

extraArgs.description: Extra argv tokens inserted before the final prompt positional argument.

type.description: Known kinds: start, exit, task, graph_ref, ai_route (structured AI branch picker after upstream output), comment, merge (join; data.mode passthrough | barrier), fork (fan-out; unconditional out_default edges only in runner). Other values: unknown executable (task-like handles in validation).

data.description: Node settings. Task nodes may include gcPin (see $defs.gcPin): n8n-style pinned output / pinData for dev reruns; runner merges payload into node_outputs unless that id is already set in --context-json. Task nodes may set stepCache: true to opt into cross-run disk step cache (F17) when the host passes --step-cache and --artifacts-base. Task nodes may set gcCursorAgent ($defs.gcCursorAgent) to run Cursor Agent CLI without hand-authored argv (command/argv still take precedence when set).

parentId.description: Optional id of a comment frame this node belongs to (editor-only grouping).

routeDescription.description: Human-readable branch label for ai_route outgoing edges (sent to routing provider).

providerKind.description: MVP: POST JSON to endpointUrl; response must include choiceIndex (1-based).

endpointUrl.description: HTTPS/HTTP URL for routing provider (POST body = ai-route request schema).

envVarApiKey.description: Name of environment variable holding Bearer token (optional; omit for local/unauthenticated endpoints).

sourceHandle.description: Source handle id: out_default (success path) or out_error (failure path after task/graph_ref failure; Dify FAIL_BRANCH-style). See python/README.md.

condition.description: Empty/null: unconditional. Max 65536 chars after trim. Literals true/false/1/0/yes/no. Mustache templates: {{dotted.path}} or {{dotted.path}} op literal (==, !=, <, <=, >, >=); first segment may be reserved $json (last_result snapshot, n8n-style). JSON object starting with { but not {{: JSON Logic subset (same predicate root). Other strings: truthiness of last_result. See python/README.md.
